steps.title: Fastest check: compare a table or graph
steps.content: For an equivalent-expression question, enter the original expression and the answer choices in a calculator table or graph. The correct choice must match for several inputs, not just one. The matching choice is C, $8{x}^{3}$.

steps.title: Algebra check
steps.content: Use the work below to confirm the identity for every allowed input. This matters because one random matching input is only a quick screen, not a proof that two expressions are always equivalent.

steps.title: Combine like terms
steps.content: Both terms have the same variable part, $x^3$, so subtract the coefficients and keep $x^3$: $$14x^3-6x^3=(14-6)x^3=8x^3.$$

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: $8x^3$ matches the correct answer, C. The exponent stays $3$ because like terms are combined by changing only the coefficient.
